title: Write Complete Route Tests
description: Write comprehensive tests for a Dart Frog API route including error cases.
instructions:
Given a user registration route at POST /api/users that:
- Accepts JSON body with name, email, password
- Returns 201 with user ID on success
- Returns 400 for invalid email format
- Returns 409 if email already exists
- Returns 422 for missing required fields

Write tests using dart_frog_test that verify:
1. Successful registration
2. Invalid email format handling
3. Duplicate email handling
4. Missing required fields
5. Invalid JSON body handling

hints.text: Use testRoute() with RequestContext to set the HTTP method and body.
For POST requests, set the content-type header to application/json.
Verify both the status code and the response body structure for each case.
